mapper.insert: insert into friend_apply (id, applicant_id, recipient_id, apply_reason, status, apply_time) values (#{id}, #{applicantId}, #{recipientId}, #{applyReason}, 0, now())
mapper.select: select fa.id, fa.applicant_id as applicantId, fa.recipient_id as recipientId, fa.apply_reason as applyReason, fa.status, fa.apply_time as applyTime, fa.handle_time as handleTime, u.nick_name as applicantNick, u.icon as icon from friend_apply fa left join user u on fa.applicant_id = u.id where fa.id = #{id}

select fa.id, fa.applicant_id as applicantId, fa.recipient_id as recipientId, fa.apply_reason as applyReason, fa.status, fa.apply_time as applyTime, fa.handle_time as handleTime, u.nick_name as applicantNick, u.icon as icon from friend_apply fa left join user u on fa.applicant_id = u.id where fa.recipient_id = #{userId} order by fa.apply_time desc
